ISAs.title: The Auditor's Responsibilities Relating to Fraud in an Audit of Financial Statements
ISAs.description: Requires the auditor to maintain professional skepticism throughout the audit and recognize the possibility of material misstatement due to fraud.

ISAs.title: Identifying and Assessing the Risks of Material Misstatement
ISAs.description: Requires the auditor to understand the entity and its environment to assess the risks of material misstatement whether due to fraud or error.

ISAs.title: The Auditor's Responses to Assessed Risks
ISAs.description: Guides the auditor in designing and implementing responses to the risks of material misstatement identified and assessed.

ISAs.title: Audit Evidence
ISAs.description: Explains what constitutes audit evidence and how the auditor obtains sufficient appropriate audit evidence to draw reasonable conclusions on which to base the auditor's opinion.
